title: delego authorization token (JWT claim set)
description: The decoded claim set of a delego authorization token (JWS, alg=EdDSA). See spec.md §9.

aud.description: Intended broker/service identifier; the broker MUST require an exact match.

exp.description: Expiry (epoch seconds); TTL MUST be <= 60s after iat.

cns.description: Consumption nonce: binds the token to one credential-release event (single-use). The broker MUST refuse a second token bearing a consumed cns.

sub.description: OPTIONAL subject: the agent/session identity the authorization was issued to, for composition with an agent-identity layer (§9.3).
